name: Rich Credit Academy
description_short: Frazier Consulting Services is a licensed, bonded credit counseling firm in Columbus, OH offering credit repair, counseling, and business credit services with free consultations.
description_long:
Frazier Consulting Services LLC operates as a credit counseling and consulting firm based in Columbus, Ohio, with over seven years of industry experience according to their owner. The company positions itself as a local, personalized alternative to national credit repair chains, emphasizing one-on-one consultations and a focus on sustainable credit building rather than quick fixes.

The company offers four primary service lines: credit repair (disputing negative items and working with third parties to remove claims), credit counseling (education on credit score factors and building strategies), business credit establishment, and business coaching. They serve both individual consumers and business clients throughout the Columbus area. All services include free initial consultations, and the company advertises "affordable prices" though specific fee structures are not disclosed on the website.

Frazier Consulting Services distinguishes itself through personal relationship building, claiming to focus on "quick, reliable results" and offering after-hours availability. The owner's seven years of experience and the company's licensed/bonded status are prominently featured. Client testimonials highlight score improvements (ranging from 40-point increases to scores not seen in 10 years) and life outcomes like homeownership at age 25.

A candid assessment reveals limited transparency: specific pricing, service timelines, and the methodology behind credit repair efforts are absent from the website. While the testimonials are positive, they lack detail about what specific services produced results. The website does not clarify whether they are a nonprofit credit counseling agency or a for-profit consulting firm, which is material to consumer understanding of their mission and incentive structure.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed and bonded company with stated seven years of owner experience in credit industry
Offers free consultations with no upfront cost commitment
Provides one-on-one personalized meetings rather than group sessions
Serves both individuals and business clients with tailored services
After-hours availability via phone (866-856-9774) for working clients
Client testimonials report measurable credit score improvements (up to 40+ points)
Local Columbus-based service with physical office at 875 N High St
cons: No pricing information disclosed—clients must call for estimates, making cost comparison impossible
Unclear whether this is a nonprofit credit counseling agency or for-profit firm; incentive structure not transparent
No information on average timeline for credit score improvements or success rates
Limited detail on specific dispute methodology or third-party relationships referenced
Website testimonials lack specifics about which services (repair vs. counseling) produced results, limiting credibility
best_for: Columbus-area residents with damaged credit seeking personalized counseling and dispute assistance
Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing business credit establishment and coaching
Individuals below 670 credit score looking for structured one-on-one guidance on credit building
diagnosis: Frazier Consulting Services is best for Columbus-area consumers and business owners seeking personalized, local credit counseling with free initial consultations. The main caveat is the complete lack of pricing transparency and unclear nonprofit vs. for-profit status, which prevents informed comparison with other credit counseling options and raises questions about potential conflicts of interest in their recommendations.
services: Credit repair with third-party dispute assistance
Credit counseling and score factor education
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 875 N High St Suite 300, Columbus, OH 43215
